title: Better F1 Reborn
description: Hide only the HUD using F1
body:
BetterF1 adds an intermediate F1 state that turns off the HUD elements, while held items are still displayed. To activate this mod, simply press F1 which will cycle through the display modes.  

Press F1 repeatedly to toggle between "no hidden UI", "only hidden UI" and "All hidden UI".  

Mod Original author: [UltimateBoomer](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ultimateboomer/projects)  
Ported from: [Better F1](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-f1)
